prompt: I have this other model that I think might not be IDFA compliant. Can you run the audit and show me exactly what's wrong?
assertions: Runs idfa_audit.py on the legacy model file
Reports Guardrail 1 FAIL — identifies coordinate references in formulas
Reports Guardrail 4 FAIL — identifies hardcoded values (0.59, 0.58 in COGS formulas)
Reports Guardrail 3 FAIL — identifies missing intent notes (0% coverage)
Reports an overall FAIL status with a low compliance score
Lists specific cells and formulas that violate each guardrail
